description_long: This is a small, stylized figure of an adult pedestrian, depicted with a rounded head and a prominent, curved red hat or cap. The figure's body is minimalistic, with a thin, elongated form and a single, curved cane or walking stick held in one hand. The overall design is highly abstract, with no visible facial features or detailed anatomy, focusing instead on the silhouette and key accessories. The cane is long and slender, with a distinct hook at the end, suggesting the figure may be elderly or require assistance while walking. The red hat is the most visually striking element, sitting atop the head and slightly tilted. The figure's posture is upright, with a slight forward lean, emphasizing movement or walking.
description: A minimalistic adult pedestrian figure with a red hat and a curved cane, depicted in an upright walking posture. The design is abstract, focusing on silhouette and key accessories.
description_view_0: The figure is seen from a front angle, highlighting the red hat, the thin body, and the curved cane extending forward.
description_view_1: A side view shows the profile of the red hat and the full length of the cane, with the body appearing as a thin vertical line.
description_view_2: The figure is viewed from the back, with the red hat visible and the cane extending away from the body.
description_view_3: A top-down view reveals the roundness of the hat and the thinness of the body, with the cane's hook shape clearly visible.
attribute_clothing_type: minimalist figure with a stylized cap and implied outerwear
attribute_posture: standing upright with a slight forward lean
